title: 2026 AI Engineer Vibe Reel
summary: The AI Engineer channel is promoting a World's Fair event in San Francisco scheduled for June 29 to July 2, 2026. The event aims to gather AI engineers and professionals in the industry.
writeup: This promotional reel covers the 2026 AI Engineer World's Fair, set for June 29 to July 2 in San Francisco. It points viewers to ai.engineer/wf for tickets and schedule details.
